title: Senior Financial Analyst - United India Insurance Capital India - Growth Opportunity

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - United India Insurance Capital India - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
United India Insurance Capital India invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Senior Financial Analyst at our Lucknow location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About United India Insurance Capital India:
United India Insurance Capital India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in Bloomberg Terminal
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Forecasting

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Learning & development budget
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with United India Insurance Capital India!
